title: Allow Embedded Object
text: Allow Embedded Object Determines whether the widget can contain an embedded object. True (default) or False . " AllowEmbedding = True | False " Value Description True The object can be embedded in the widget. False The object cannot be embedded in the widget. Usage Dynamic? Yes Supported in Grid? No Dependencies: None Using in ProcScript You can use $properties or $fieldproperties to set or get the property and its value. For more information, see $properties and $fieldproperties . $fieldproperties(FLD) = "AllowEmbedding=False" Copy Applies to uOleContainer (OleContainer) Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
